af_score_components.notes: Arch Linux MCP. Has MCP. Package management/system info. Documentation adequate. No auth (local). Rate limits. System tools focused.

security_score_components.security_notes: Local system tool. Full filesystem access (user permissions). No network. Can modify system packages (privilege risk).

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: System tool reliability. Depends on local Arch stability.

af_score_components.notes: Archive Agent MCP. Has MCP. File archive handling. Documentation moderate. No auth (local). Rate limits. File operations focused.

security_score_components.security_notes: Local tool. Archive processing (compressed files). Extraction risks (zip bombs, path traversal). No sandboxing.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Archive handling reliability. Format support varies.

af_score_components.notes: Arduino MCP Server. Has MCP. Hardware programming platform. Documentation good. No auth (local). Rate limits. Hardware development focused.

security_score_components.security_notes: Local hardware communication. No encryption. Device trust model. Code upload to device (execution).

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Arduino SDK stability. Device reliability hardware-dependent.

af_score_components.notes: Argentine Law MCP. Has MCP. Legal/compliance content for Argentina. Documentation moderate. Auth varies. Rate limits. Regional legal focused.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS likely. Legal content (confidential). Auth for legal data. Regional compliance (Argentine law).

af_score_components.notes: ArgoCD MCP. Has MCP (quality 80). Kubernetes deployment automation. Excellent documentation. Token-based auth. Rate limits. DevOps focused.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. ArgoCD auth (token/RBAC). Kubernetes deployment control (critical privilege). Fine-grained permissions. Secret management.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: ArgoCD is mature deployment tool. Suitable for continuous deployment automation.

af_score_components.notes: ArgoCD MCP Server (variant). Has MCP. Kubernetes deployment. Documentation good. Token auth. Rate limits. Similar to argocd-mcp.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS. ArgoCD auth. Deployment control. Strong security.

af_score_components.notes: aristocles-data-ap (unclear). No MCP. Documentation minimal. Early stage.
arjunkmrm-ahoy. Has MCP (quality 65). Early experimental project. Documentation sparse. Likely development/testing tool.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Experimental project. Limited reliability track record.

af_score_components.notes: arjunkmrm-boba-tea. Has MCP. Experimental. Unclear purpose (likely test/demo).
arjunkmrm-bobo. Has MCP. Experimental test project.
